title: Project Manager, Strategic Messaging (m/f/d)
company: DSV - Global Transport and Logistics / Schenker Aktiengesellschaft
location: Krefeld, Germany (or various DSV European offices)

company_info.size_raw: DSV is a top-5 global logistics company

matched_skills: Internal communications (HSBC hybrid town halls 300+ attendees, newsletters)
Stakeholder engagement at C-suite and cross-functional levels
Strategic messaging and narrative shaping (IPC GTM strategy, HSBC C-suite reporting)
Project coordination for communications campaigns (HSBC, Hapag-Lloyd feature releases)
English and German fluency (bilingual communications capability)
Global/international experience (HSBC international PMO, Hapag-Lloyd global logistics)
Change communications support (Hapag-Lloyd internal comms for feature releases)
missing_skills: Dedicated corporate communications or change communications title/function
External communications or PR campaign management
Communications strategy ownership at senior/lead level
Experience in a communications agency or comms-led role
key_requirements: Experience in strategic, corporate, or change communications
Project management of communication campaigns end-to-end
Stakeholder engagement across multiple organizational levels
Strong written and verbal English; German advantageous
Global or international work environment experience
cv_highlights: HSBC PMO: managed hybrid town halls for 300+ attendees, C-suite data storytelling and reporting
Hapag-Lloyd: internal communications for product feature releases in global logistics context
IPC: go-to-market strategy and brand communications as Marketing Manager
Moli Media: event communications and KOL coordination
Multilingual: English, German, Chinese, Cantonese — strong asset for global DSV comms role
Logistics sector familiarity via Hapag-Lloyd is directly relevant to DSV/Schenker context
gaps: Role is primarily corporate/change communications, not traditional PMO — Boru's comms work is real but secondary to her PMO positioning
No explicit external communications or media relations experience
Communications campaign ownership at a senior or lead level not clearly evidenced
Krefeld location is ~500km from Lüneburg; relocation or remote arrangement would be needed
recommended_emphasis: Lead with HSBC internal communications achievements: town halls, C-suite storytelling, newsletters
Frame Hapag-Lloyd role around change communications for feature releases, not just coordination
Highlight IPC GTM strategy as evidence of end-to-end communications campaign management
Emphasize multilingual capability (English/German/Chinese) as strategic asset for global DSV messaging
Position logistics sector experience (Hapag-Lloyd) as domain-relevant background for DSV/Schenker
Reframe PMO governance skills as enabling structured, on-time delivery of communications projects
recommendation: Apply with tailored positioning. Boru has genuine internal communications experience across HSBC, Hapag-Lloyd, and IPC that directly maps to this role's requirements. The fit is strong on stakeholder communication, narrative shaping, and international context. The main gap is that this role skews toward communications leadership rather than PMO — the CV should foreground comms achievements over PMO tooling. Geographic distance (Krefeld) is a practical consideration but not a blocker given DSV's multi-office European setup.
